{"activeBranchId":0,"chainList":[{"description":"答剑·弦歌不辍、答剑·割股之心、答剑·忠烈死节免疫打断。
仇远暴击提升20%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1761711147608.png","name":"如剑不动，相由心生","order":1,"unlocked":true},{"description":"【"竹照"】获得时增加额外效果：附近队伍中的角色声骸技能伤害加深30%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1761710899611.png","name":"剑啊，谓我弃绝弦歌不辍","order":2,"unlocked":true},{"description":"共鸣解放万钧一断伤害倍率增加500%。
协奏能量充满且不处于【淋漓醉墨】状态下时，仇远的共鸣技能替换为共鸣技能荷蓑出林，每20秒可施放1次。
施放荷蓑出林时，提前结束且从容效果，消耗60点协奏能量并回复【"挑灯问剑"】400点，对目标造成仇远自身500%攻击的气动伤害，此次伤害视为声骸技能伤害，下一次常态攻击普攻替换为答剑·质黑相青第三段。
施放荷蓑出林后，下次仇远进入【"淋漓醉墨"】状态时无法获得且从容效果，答剑·弦歌不辍、答剑·割股之心、答剑·忠烈死节伤害倍率增加600%，答剑·忠烈死节命中时额外获得协奏能量30点。
施放荷蓑出林后，非联机状态下下次延奏技能替换为延奏技能新筠坠箨，造成仇远自身500%攻击的气动伤害，此次伤害视为声骸技能伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1761710799103.png","name":"剑啊，谓我弃绝割股之心","order":3,"unlocked":true},{"description":"仇远攻击提升20%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1761711173338.png","name":"剑啊，谓我弃绝忠烈死节","order":4,"unlocked":true},{"description":"仇远无视目标15%的防御。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1761711323559.png","name":"剑啊，如今我弹铗而歌","order":5,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放重击答剑·忠烈死节时，停滞周围的敌人，持续5秒，该效果联机状态下不会生效。切换至其他角色或目标受到伤害时提前清除停滞效果。
退出【"淋漓醉墨"】状态且为队伍中登场角色时，对范围内敌人造成自身600%攻击的气动伤害，该伤害视为声骸技能伤害。
施放共鸣技能荷蓑出林后，仇远暴击伤害增加100%，持续6秒。切换至其他角色时，效果提前结束。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1761710843963.png","name":"如是我闻、我见、我言","order":6,"unlocked":true}],"equipPhantomAddPropList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png"},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"1498","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png"},{"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"40","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"42.3%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"127.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png"},{"attributeName":"普攻伤害加成","attributeValue":"20.2%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625543277.png"},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"44.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625563297.png"},{"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"40.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625723554.png"}],"equipPhantomAttributeList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625411169.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"450","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625640635.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"109.1%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625513563.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"40","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625555901.png","key":"10010-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"42.3%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625349422.png","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"127.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766626216694.png","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"普攻伤害加成","attributeValue":"20.2%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766626100523.png","key":"17-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"44.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625385461.png","key":"18-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"30.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766626206569.png","key":"25-1","valid":true}],"level":90,"phantomData":{"cost":12,"equipPhantomList":[{"cost":4,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"","groupId":21,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1755850686433.png","name":"息界同调之律","num":3,"secondDescription":"","tripleDescription":"角色施放声骸技能时，自身重击伤害加成提升30%，持续4秒；队伍中角色声骸技能伤害加成提升4%，该效果可叠加4层，持续30秒，同名声骸仅可触发1次该效果。4层时施放声骸技能可刷新持续时间，效果消失时重置同名声骸记录。","type":1},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"44.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626001915.png","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"150","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626168865.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":4,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1753085498115.png","name":"共鸣回响·芬莱克","phantomId":6000116,"phantomPropId":60001165,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤【教律龙爪】，对周围敌人造成273.60%的气动伤害。

在首位装配该声骸技能时，自身气动伤害加成提升12.00%，重击伤害加成提升12.00%。

技能冷却：15秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21.0%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true}]},{"cost":3,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"","groupId":21,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1755850686433.png","name":"息界同调之律","num":3,"secondDescription":"","tripleDescription":"角色施放声骸技能时，自身重击伤害加成提升30%，持续4秒；队伍中角色声骸技能伤害加成提升4%，该效果可叠加4层，持续30秒，同名声骸仅可触发1次该效果。4层时施放声骸技能可刷新持续时间，效果消失时重置同名声骸记录。","type":1},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"30.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625876982.png","key":"25-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"100","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626168865.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":3,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1739260679759.png","name":"重塑雕像的拳砾","phantomId":6000096,"phantomPropId":60000965,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，幻形为重塑雕像的拳砾攻击目标，造成313.20%的衍射伤害。长按声骸技能，持续幻形，前冲并攻击目标造成469.80%的衍射伤害。
技能冷却：20秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"气动伤害提升10%","groupId":4,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735782965684.png","name":"啸谷长风","num":2,"secondDescription":"使用变奏技能登场时，气动伤害提升30%，持续15秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031742230.png","name":"通行灯偶","phantomId":6000050,"phantomPropId":60000505,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤通行灯偶，定身最多1秒，敌人受击后会解除定身状态。
 技能冷却：15秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"气动伤害提升10%","groupId":4,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735782965684.png","name":"啸谷长风","num":2,"secondDescription":"使用变奏技能登场时，气动伤害提升30%，持续15秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031741751.png","name":"幼猿","phantomId":6000038,"phantomPropId":60000385,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，幻形为幼猿发动前扑，造成48.00%+96气动伤害。
 技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":true}]}]},"role":{"acronym":"qy","attributeId":4,"attributeName":"气动","breach":6,"chainUnlockNum":6,"isMainRole":false,"level":90,"roleIconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_icon/1761710845116.png","roleId":1411,"roleName":"仇远","rolePicUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_pic/1766623752503.png","starLevel":5,"weaponTypeId":2,"weaponTypeName":"迅刀"},"roleAttributeList":[{"attributeId":2,"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"16797","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png","sort":1000},{"attributeId":7,"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"2862","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png","sort":2000},{"attributeId":10,"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"1197","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png","sort":3000},{"attributeId":8,"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"89.8%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png","sort":5000},{"attributeId":9,"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"299%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png","sort":6000},{"attributeId":11,"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"100.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png","sort":7000},{"attributeId":141,"attributeName":"偏谐值累积效率","attributeValue":"100.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625821120.png","sort":7500},{"attributeId":18,"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"58%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625563297.png","sort":10000},{"attributeId":25,"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"70%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625723554.png","sort":16000}],"roleSkin":{"isAddition":false,"picUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_pic/1766623281540.png","priority":1,"quality":3,"qualityName":"初始服饰","roleId":1411,"skinIcon":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_icon/1761710974471.png","skinId":81001411,"skinName":"孤馆灯青"},"skillList":[{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"普攻
进行最多三段的连续攻击，造成气动伤害。

重击
消耗耐力攻击目标，造成气动伤害。施放后一定时间内，短按普攻将施放普攻答剑·质黑相青第四段。

空中攻击
消耗耐力进行空中下落攻击，造成气动伤害。

闪避反击
成功闪避后，短按普攻将会攻击目标，造成气动伤害，此次伤害视为重击伤害。
施放普攻和重击后一定时间内，若受到敌方目标攻击，免疫此次伤害并施放闪避反击，攻击目标并造成气动伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1761448631820.png","id":641,"name":"质黑相青","skillBranches":[],"type":"常态攻击"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"短按共鸣技能，仇远向前突进一段距离，造成气动伤害，此次伤害视为声骸技能伤害。即将受到敌方目标攻击时，施放共鸣技能，免疫此次伤害并停滞周围敌人，此次共鸣技能免疫打断。
切换至其他角色时提前清除停滞效果。

不辞远
长按共鸣技能，仇远向前突进一段距离，对目标造成气动伤害，此次伤害视为声骸技能伤害。
按住共鸣技能时，若周围没有目标，仇远会升入空中向前奔袭并持续消耗耐力，奔袭可持续一段时间。在空中时，耐力耗尽或松开共鸣技能将提前结束奔袭，奔袭结束时若周围有目标，会对目标造成气动伤害，此次伤害视为声骸技能伤害。此技能可在空中施放。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1761449299967.png","id":642,"name":"穿林打叶","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"对范围内的目标造成气动伤害，此次伤害视为声骸技能伤害。
仇远暴击高于50%时，每多出1%暴击，施放该技能时，附近队伍中的登场角色提升2%暴击伤害，持续30秒。最高可提升30%暴击伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1761449510559.png","id":643,"name":"万钧一断","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣解放"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"攻击目标，造成气动伤害，此次伤害视为重击伤害。
施放该技能后一定时间内短按普攻，将施放普攻答剑·质黑相青第三段。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1761448983229.png","id":646,"name":"攻其必救","skillBranches":[],"type":"变奏技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"普攻·答剑·质黑相青
【"挑灯问剑"】达到200点时，普攻替换为普攻答剑·质黑相青，进行最多四段的连续攻击，造成气动伤害，此次伤害视为重击伤害。

竹照
【"挑灯问剑"】达到400点时，获得【竹照】效果，附近队伍中的登场角色声骸技能伤害加成提升30%，持续30秒。

淋漓醉墨
【"挑灯问剑"】满时，仇远进入【淋漓醉墨】状态，重击替换为重击答剑·割股之心，持续8秒。
【淋漓醉墨】状态下，长按普攻可消耗【挑灯问剑】依次施放重击答剑·弦歌不辍、答剑·割股之心、答剑·忠烈死节，造成气动伤害，此伤害视为重击伤害。
·施放答剑·弦歌不辍、答剑·割股之心、答剑·忠烈死节时，视为施放声骸技能。
·【挑灯问剑】耗尽时，仇远提前退出【淋漓醉墨】状态。

【挑灯问剑】获取规则
【挑灯问剑】上限为600点。
·施放普攻第三段时，获得【挑灯问剑】100点。
·施放普攻答剑·质黑相青每段可获得【挑灯问剑】100点。
·施放闪避反击时，获得【挑灯问剑】100点。
·施放变奏技能时，获得【挑灯问剑】400点。
·【淋漓醉墨】状态期间，无法获得【挑灯问剑】。
·【淋漓醉墨】状态结束时，清空【挑灯问剑】。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1761449480067.png","id":647,"name":"裁竹为锋","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣回路"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":1,"skill":{"description":"攻击目标，造成仇远自身100%攻击的气动伤害，此次伤害视为声骸技能伤害。
